memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InServerApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: ServerStatistic

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Create stat items for a user.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteStatisticSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteStatisticSortBy::UPDATED_AT_ASC)
memberdef.name: GetAllUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Get all stat items from a specified user id.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0.
Sorting method for the statistic result.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes, TArray< FString > const &Tags, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteStatisticSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteStatisticSortBy::UPDATED_AT_ASC)
memberdef.name: GetUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Get a user stat items by specifying statCodes and tags to get from. Returned stat items will only contain stat items specified by statCodes and tags (inclusive).

parameterdescription.para: Specify statCodes for stat items to get from this method
Specify tags for for stat items to get from this method
Specify tags for for stat items to get from this method
This will be called when the operation failed.
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0.
Sorting method for the statistic result.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &CycleId, FString const &TargetUserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatCycleItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes={}, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetUserStatCycleItems

briefdescription.para: Get a user stat items within the cycle.

parameterdescription.para: the CycleId where the stat items belong to
the user Id to be queried
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserStatCycleItemPagingSlicedResult
This will be called when the operation failed
Optional. the StatCode of the user stat item. Determine which stat code to get with the cycle id.
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkUserStatItemInc > const &Data, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: IncrementManyUsersStatItems

briefdescription.para: Bulk add stat item(s) value from specified user id(s) by stat code(s).

parameterdescription.para: array consist of increased value, user id, and stat code.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemInc > const &Data, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: IncrementUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Increment stat items of a user (could be negative).

parameterdescription.para: array consist of increased value and stat code.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &StatCode, TArray< FString > const &UserIds, FString const &AdditionalKey, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsFetchUser > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkFetchUserStatItemValues

briefdescription.para: Bulk fetch multiple user's stat item values for a given namespace and statCode. If stat item does not exist, will return default value.

parameterdescription.para: This is the StatCode that will be stored in the slot.
This is the UserId array that will be stored in the slot.
This is the AdditionalKey that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsFetchUser.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &StatCode, TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsStatItemValueResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkFetchStatItemsValue

briefdescription.para: Bulk fetch multiple user's stat item values for a given namespace and statCode.

parameterdescription.para: This is the StatCode that will be stored in the slot.
This is the UserId array that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsStatItemValueResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItem > const &BulkUpdateMultipleUserStatItems, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkUpdateMultipleUserStatItemsValue

briefdescription.para: Bulk update multiple user's statitems value with specific update strategy.

parameterdescription.para: This is the BulkUpdateMultipleUserStatItem array that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &AdditionalKey, TArray< FAccelByteModelsUserStatItem > const &BulkUserStatItems, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkResetUserStatItemsValues

briefdescription.para: Bulk reset user's statitem values for given namespace and user.

parameterdescription.para: This is the UserId that will be stored in the slot.
This is the AdditionalKey that will be stored in the slot.
This is the BulkUserStatItem array that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FAccelByteModelsResetUserStatItemValue > const &UserStatItemValue, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkResetMultipleUserStatItemsValue

briefdescription.para: Bulk reset multiple user's statitems value. User's statitem value will be reset to the default value defined in the statistic configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Array of UserId and StatCode.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is TArray<FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &AdditionalKey, TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemWithStatCode > const &BulkUpdateUserStatItems, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkUpdateUserStatItemValue

briefdescription.para: Bulk update user's statitems value for given namespace and user with specific update strategy.

parameterdescription.para: UserId.
This is the AdditionalKey that will be stored in the slot.
This is the BulkUpdateUserStatItem array that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &StatCode, FString const &AdditionalKey, FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItem const &UpdateUserStatItemValue, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemValueResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateUserStatItemValue

briefdescription.para: Update user's statitem value for a given namespace and user with a certain update strategy.

parameterdescription.para: UserId.
StatCode.
This is the AdditionalKey that will be stored in the slot.
This is the FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItem that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemValueResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &StatCode, FString const &AdditionalKey, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Delete user's stat items for given namespace, statCode, and user Id. If query param additionalKey is provided, it will delete user stat items of specific key (i.e. characterName). Otherwise, it will delete all stat items related to the user Id..

parameterdescription.para: This is the UserId that will be stored in the slot.
This is the StatCode that will be stored in the slot.
This is the AdditionalKey that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &StatCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGlobalStatItemValueResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGlobalStatItemsByStatCode

briefdescription.para: Get global stat items by specifying statCodes.

parameterdescription.para: The StatCode of the global stat items
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsGlobalStatItemValueResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsGlobalStatItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes={}, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: ListGlobalStatItems

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsGlobalStatItemValueResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: ServerStatistic

memberdef.argsstring: (ServerStatistic const &)=delete
memberdef.name: ServerStatistic

memberdef.argsstring: (ServerStatistic &&)=delete
memberdef.name: ServerStatistic

memberdef.argsstring: (const EAccelByteStatisticSortBy &SortBy)
memberdef.name: ConvertUserStatisticSortByToString

briefdescription.para: Statistic API to manage user's in-game profiles's statistic.
